heading: Duty to maintain corporate and tax-exempt status
label: 20208 Duty to maintain corporate and tax-exempt status
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)20208(a)36 App.:5808(e)., , §§ 1508(e), 1514 (related to duty to maintain status), , 1966.Nov. 18, 1997Pub. L. 105–85, title XV111 Stat. 196520208(b)36 App.:5813 (related to duty to maintain status).In subsection (a), the words “organized and” are omitted as unnecessary.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)20208(a)36 App.:5808(e)., , §§ 1508(e), 1514 (related to duty to maintain status), , 1966.Nov. 18, 1997Pub. L. 105–85, title XV111 Stat. 196520208(b)36 App.:5813 (related to duty to maintain status).In subsection (a), the words “organized and” are omitted as unnecessary.

children.heading: .—Corporate Status
children.label: a .—Corporate Status
children.text: The corporation shall maintain its status as a corporation incorporated under the laws of the District of Columbia.

children.heading: .—Tax-Exempt Status
children.label: b .—Tax-Exempt Status
children.text: The corporation shall maintain its status as an organization exempt from taxation under the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 ( et seq.).26 U.S.C. 1
